cards.prompt: List pattern форма и длина: четыре is-проверки для {1,2,3}?
cards.code: int[] numbers = { 1, 2, 3 }; System.Console.WriteLine(numbers is [1, 2, 3]); System.Console.WriteLine(numbers is [1, 2, 4]); System.Console.WriteLine(numbers is [1, 2, 3, 4]); System.Console.WriteLine(numbers is [0 or 1, <= 2, >= 3]);

cards.prompt: Slice .. матчит ноль или больше: четыре is-проверки?
cards.code: System.Console.WriteLine(new[] { 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 } is [> 0, > 0, ..]); System.Console.WriteLine(new[] { 1, 2, 3, 4 } is [.., > 0, > 0]); System.Console.WriteLine(new[] { 2, 4 } is [.., 2, 4]); System.Console.WriteLine(new[] { 1, 2, 3, 4 } is [>= 0, .., 2 or 4]);

cards.prompt: Slice с захватом .. var s: MatchMessage(aBBA)/MatchMessage(apron)?
cards.code: void MatchMessage(string message) { var result = message is ['a' or 'A', .. var s, 'a' or 'A'] ? $"Message {message} matches; inner part is {s}." : $"Message {message} doesn't match."; System.Console.WriteLine(result); } MatchMessage("aBBA"); MatchMessage("apron");
cards.expectedOutput:
Message aBBA matches; inner part is BB.
Message apron doesn't match.
